WAFFLESTACK

Team

Specialist agents installed in this repo, assembled from the wafflestack selection. Delegate to one by name; each lists the skills it can hand off to.

  • docs-agent

    Agent-optimized documentation writer.

    docs-agent accurate

  • docs-human

    Human-readable documentation writer.

    docs-human prose md-maximalist

  • lead-engineer

    Senior architect for the Synapse codebase.

  • plugin-architect

    Obsidian plugin architecture specialist.

    obsidian-plugin-dev tdd git-workflow issue

  • product-manager

    Product strategy and discovery specialist for Synapse.

    issue

  • project-manager

    Project coordinator that reads the GitHub backlog, assigns issues to specialist agents, orchestrates parallel and serial execution, and creates new issues when gaps are found

    delegate git-workflow github-project-management github-project-board issue

  • security-engineer

    Security auditor. Reviews code for secrets, command injection, input validation, API key handling, and .gitignore enforcement. Implements security guardrails.

    git-workflow issue

  • task-planner

    Sprint planning and task-tracking specialist for Synapse.

    github-project-management issue

8 agents · generated by wafflestack render — do not edit
